user.title: WhatsApp Media Processor
user.description: Home Assistant will find the installed WhatsApp Media Processor add-on automatically.

reconfigure.title: WhatsApp Media Processor
reconfigure.description: Rediscover the installed WhatsApp Media Processor add-on.

error.cannot_connect: Could not find a running WhatsApp Media Processor add-on. Check that the add-on is installed and started.

abort.already_configured: WhatsApp Media Processor is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not find a running WhatsApp Media Processor add-on.

process_audio.name: Process WhatsApp audio
process_audio.description: Decrypt a WhatsApp audio message and return the transcription.

code.name: Media key
code.description: The WhatsApp media key, base64 encoded.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.

process_document.name: Process WhatsApp document
process_document.description: Decrypt a WhatsApp document, save it locally, and return labeled Tesseract plus OpenAI OCR output.

code.name: Media key
code.description: The WhatsApp media key, base64 encoded.

filename.name: Filename
filename.description: Filename to use for the saved document.

save_dir.name: Save directory
save_dir.description: Optional absolute directory path where the document should be saved.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.

process_image.name: Process WhatsApp image
process_image.description: Decrypt a WhatsApp image or sticker and return labeled Tesseract OCR plus OpenAI image-analysis output.

code.name: Media key
code.description: The WhatsApp media key, base64 encoded.

text.name: Caption or request
text.description: Text context to send with the image.

media_type.name: Media type
media_type.description: Use image for photos and sticker for WhatsApp stickers.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.

process_video.name: Process WhatsApp video
process_video.description: Run a base64-encoded ffmpeg command through the add-on.

user_id.name: User ID
user_id.description: Optional user identifier to return with the add-on response.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for processing, in seconds.
